intentSynonyms: get a notebook guide in notebooklm
look up a notebook guide in notebooklm
fetch a single notebook guide in notebooklm
view one specific notebook guide in notebooklm
get ai summary of sources in notebooklm
description: Generate an AI summary of all sources in a notebook, along with suggested questions for deeper exploration. This is the primary way to get NotebookLM to analyze and synthesize your sources.
